title: Robert Johnston
compiled_truth: Robert Johnston is an Enron employee at [Enron](companies/enron). Over the corpus period (2000-06-19 to 2002-02-13), Robert Johnston sent 71 and received 179 emails, totalling 250 interactions. Top correspondents: [Scott Tholan](people/scott-tholan) (53), [Gary Hickerson](people/gary-hickerson) (45), [Jeff Kinneman](people/jeff-kinneman) (42), [Michael Bradley](people/michael-bradley) (38), [Markus Fiala](people/markus-fiala) (34). Mailbox folders observed: _americas, deleted_items, markets, old_inbox, pr_crisis_management.
